use_cases: Primary action buttons in forms and calls-to-action across web applications
Navigation triggers and link-like interactions with ghost and link variants
Icon buttons for toolbars and compact UI sections
Destructive action buttons with red styling for delete or warning operations
Secondary and outline buttons for less prominent actions in multi-step flows
ai_summary: A versatile, accessible button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority. Features multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with consistent shadow styling, focus-visible outlines, and smooth hover transitions. Designed for composition via asChild pattern, making it adaptable as a primitive for building complex interactive elements.
